reviews.comment:

Beautiful place, a great change, the kindness and courtesy of the staff were outstanding. Everything was lovely.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar. Lo visitamos en una parada de descanso con la familia, con lo necesario, baños limpios, cafetería y provisiones para el camino. Atención muy cordial y amables. Dispuestos a ayudar y brindar soluciones.
Lo encontramos bastante cambiado para bien. Recomendable. En crecimiento, éxitos!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place. We visited during a family rest stop, and it had everything we needed: clean restrooms, a café, and supplies for the road. The service was very friendly and helpful, always willing to assist and provide solutions. We found it has improved considerably. Highly recommended. Congratulations on its continued growth!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNydFA2Z0pREAE

reviews.comment:
Una estación IMPECABLE. Buena atención, variedad en el servicompras (sobre todo las chipas, medialunas y el café 🤤). Baños muy limpios.y con buen aroma. Muy recomendable 👌🏼.

(Translated by Google)
An IMPECCABLE station. Excellent service, a variety of options at the convenience store (especially the chipas, croissants, and coffee 🤤). Very clean and pleasantly scented restrooms. Highly recommended 👌🏼.

reviews.comment:
Desde hacian meses no llegaba a dicha estacion por no contar con baños adecuados.
Hoy la vi refaccionada, con una atencion excelente, buen servicio y me llamò la atenciòn la higiene de los baños con todos los elementos necesarios y en estado impecable. Recomiendo la llegada a èse lugar.

(Translated by Google)
I hadn't been to this station for months because it didn't have adequate restrooms.
Today I saw it renovated, with excellent service, and I was impressed by the cleanliness of the restrooms, which were fully equipped and in impeccable condition. I highly recommend visiting this place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNMNTZLYUFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Debo felicitar porque  en una visita que acabo de hacer al ver remodelada dicha estación y el trato amable del personal, además de los baños en estado impecable me sentí plenamente satisfecho y recomiendo a que visiten.

(Translated by Google)
I must congratulate you because on a visit I just made, seeing the remodeled station and the friendly staff, in addition to the impeccable restrooms, I felt completely satisfied and I recommend you visit.
